steps: Grip two adjacent tabletop edges and rotate the table smoothly around one near corner as the pivot point, then bring it back, repeatedly.

name: Attaching-pin
steps: Pin the bottom hem of your shirt to a higher part of the shirt to make a small gathered tuck that stays attached, repeatedly.

name: Manipulation-tickle
steps: Use your knuckles to make very light, rapid touches along your ribs through your shirt, repeatedly.

name: Undressing-pull_off
steps: Pull the hoodie off quickly with clear effort, as if it resists, then put it back on and pull it off with the same strong yank, repeatedly.

name: Undressing-pull_off
steps: While wearing the hoodie, twist your torso and pull the hoodie off forcefully, then put it back on, repeatedly.

name: Placing-put
steps: Shuttle between A and B with the pen in your hand, and put the pen down each time you reach the endpoint, repeatedly.

name: Taking-seize
steps: Side-step along the edge from A to B while keeping the chair tight to your torso and making sharp tugging motions on it, repeatedly.

name: Cause_to_move_in_place-shake
steps: Walk backward from B to center while shaking the mop in quick up-down motions, repeatedly.

name: Attaching-pin
steps: Carefully pin your shirt sleeve fabric to the side of your shirt with the pushpin so the sleeve stays held against your torso, repeatedly.

name: Cause_to_move_in_place-shake
steps: Shake the mop hard back and forth, like shaking water off, repeatedly.

name: Cause_motion-push
steps: With both hands on the top of the box, push it away from your body along the floor in short drives, repeatedly.

name: Emptying-empty
steps: Lift the box to chest height and rotate it so different corners point down, as if getting the last bits to fall out, repeatedly.

name: Taking-seize
steps: Shuttle between A and B while tugging the mop toward you in short, forceful pulls as if seizing it away from where it was held, repeatedly.

name: Adjusting-adjust
steps: Shuttle between A and B while keeping both hands on the table and pushing it with you to adjust where it sits on the floor, repeatedly.

name: Cause_to_move_in_place-shake
steps: Grip one tabletop edge with both hands and shake the table in short, forceful back-and-forth bursts so the legs jitter without sliding away, repeatedly.

name: Cause_to_move_in_place-turn
steps: Walk from center to C while turning the mop head to trace small circles on the floor as you go, repeatedly.

name: Adjusting-tweak
steps: Walk a figure-eight around center while holding the chair and making tiny tweaks to keep it level as you travel, repeatedly.

name: Taking-take
steps: Walk a figure-eight around center while carrying the chair in front of you with both hands, repeatedly.

name: Bringing-take
steps: Take the box from A to B by shuttling between them, repeatedly.

name: Removing-dislodge
steps: Tilt the bucket and snap it back upright with a quick motion to dislodge debris from the bottom, repeatedly.

name: Cause_motion-push
steps: Walk a figure-eight around center while pushing the table ahead of you, repeatedly.

name: Undressing-peel_off
steps: Peel the hoodie off gradually, as if it is snug around your shoulders, then put it back on and peel it off again in that slow, clinging way, repeatedly.

name: Adjusting-adjust
steps: Shuttle between A and B while keeping both hands on the table and pushing it with you to adjust where it sits on the floor, repeatedly.

name: Change_posture-lean
steps: With your hands on the chair seat, lean your upper body over the chair so your body slopes forward, then return to upright, repeatedly.

name: Placing-brush
steps: Squat and brush the bristles firmly across a small patch of floor in straight back-and-forth strokes, repeatedly.

name: Placing-smear
steps: Walk a figure-eight around center while using one hand low to sweep seeds across the floor so they smear into a thin line on your path, repeatedly.

name: Placing-shoulder
steps: Lift the chair and carry it with the backrest resting on your shoulder, then set it back down, repeatedly.

name: Cause_to_move_in_place-swirl
steps: Hold the box out in front of you and move it in a smooth horizontal circle, repeatedly.

name: Cause_to_move_in_place-juggle
steps: With a ball in each hand, do a simple two-ball juggle by tossing one ball to the other hand and tossing the second ball before the first one is caught so they overlap briefly in the air, repeatedly.

name: Taking-grab
steps: Walk a figure-eight around center while sliding the box along the floor with both hands, and frequently grab it up off the floor into your arms and return it down without letting go, repeatedly.

name: Emptying-expunge
steps: Shuttle between C and D while carrying the box and tipping it while wiping the inside as if expunging all traces, repeatedly.

name: Bringing-carry
steps: Carry the table with both hands and walk backward from D to A, then bring it back the same way, repeatedly.

name: Attaching-mount
steps: With both hands, mount the frame near the floor against the wall, then remount it at shoulder height, repeatedly.

name: Cause_motion-pull
steps: Shuttle between A and C while pulling the mop back toward your body each time you set off, repeatedly.

name: Taking-seize
steps: Walk a figure-eight around center while sliding the box along the floor with both hands, and periodically yank it up off the floor as if it is being resisted, repeatedly.

name: Bringing-hump
steps: Hump the table sideways from C to D by side-stepping while you keep it tilted on two legs and force it along, repeatedly.

name: Manipulation-hold
steps: Hold the ball behind your lower back with both hands, keeping it pressed in place without letting it slip.

name: Emptying-divest
steps: While walking backward from C to D, divest yourself of the zip-up hoodie by taking it off and letting it hang from your hand, then put it back on, repeatedly.

name: Taking-seize
steps: Shuttle between A and B while gripping the chair firmly and snapping it close to you each time you change direction, repeatedly.

name: Food_gathering-pick
steps: Squat down to pick an apple from the floor, then rise and hold it up at about chest height before placing it back down, repeatedly.

name: Adjusting-tweak
steps: With both hands on the tabletop edge, give the table tiny nudges to fine-tune its placement without moving it much overall, repeatedly.

name: Placing-smear
steps: Walk a figure-eight around center while smearing mud onto the floor each time you pass through the middle, repeatedly.

name: Cause_to_move_in_place-swing
steps: Walk a figure-eight around center while keeping both hands on the tabletop and swinging the table gently side to side as you move around it, repeatedly.

name: Emptying-cleanse
steps: Hold the box close and wipe the inside with both palms in long strokes as if cleansing it, repeatedly.

name: Emptying-unload
steps: Walk backward from D to A while lowering the box and tipping it forward as if unloading it onto the floor, repeatedly.

name: Placing-pile
steps: Shuttle between center and A carrying a book, and each time you arrive at A, place it onto the top of a growing pile, repeatedly.

name: Cause_motion-lift
steps: Walk backward from A to B while holding the chair off the floor, briefly lifting it higher and lowering it slightly as you move, repeatedly.

name: Placing-insert
steps: Walk a figure-eight around center while inserting the key into the padlock keyway and removing it, repeatedly.

name: Cause_motion-pull
steps: Walk backward from A to center while pulling the mop toward you so it follows behind your steps, repeatedly.

name: Filling-shower
steps: Side-step along the edge from A to B while letting seeds shower down in a scattered trail on the floor beside you, repeatedly.

name: Cause_to_move_in_place-juggle
steps: With a ball in each hand, do a simple two-ball juggle by tossing one ball to the other hand and tossing the second ball before the first one is caught so they overlap briefly in the air, repeatedly.

name: Placing-immerse
steps: Side-step from A to B while dipping the hoodie into the bucket and lifting it back out, repeatedly.

name: Placing-immerse
steps: Push the hoodie down into the bucket so it stays tucked inside below the rim.

name: Manipulation-tickle
steps: Lightly brush the back of your hand over the side of your waist in small, quick strokes, repeatedly.

name: Placing-lean
steps: Side-step along the edge from A to B while keeping both hands on the box and leaning it against the wall so it slides along, repeatedly.

name: Manipulation-tickle
steps: Lightly brush the back of your hand over the side of your waist in small, quick strokes, repeatedly.

name: Placing-insert
steps: Set the box with its opening facing up, and insert the ball down into the box as if fitting it neatly inside, repeatedly.

name: Removing-take
steps: Take the bucket away from right in front of you by pulling it in close and shifting it to your side while keeping your hands on it, repeatedly.

name: Cause_motion-push
steps: Shuttle between A and C while pushing the table ahead of you the whole way, repeatedly.

name: Attaching-fasten
steps: Fasten the box against your torso by looping the rope around you and the box and tying it, then walk a figure-eight around center.

name: Change_posture-lean
steps: Hold the box against your torso and lean your body to one side into a sloping posture, then return upright, repeatedly.

name: Adjusting-tweak
steps: Walk a figure-eight around center while carrying the closed box with both hands, and make tiny grip shifts to subtly level the box and keep the lid seated, repeatedly.

name: Removing-dislodge
steps: Side-step along the edge from A to B while giving the bucket short, sudden shakes to dislodge anything stuck inside, repeatedly.

name: Removing-dislodge
steps: Set the bucket down and lightly bump its base against the floor to dislodge anything wedged inside, repeatedly.
